type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: A mistake was found for kiln emissions. There was double counting for most substances: information from kiln stack was added to emissions from combustion of each individual fuel (Oil, Biomass, Propane). Emissions for the dryer is now calculated separately from the kiln.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: For the wind erosion of the biomass storage pile, there was no EF for PM2.5 in 2018. We now make the conservative assumption that the EF for PM10 = EF for PM2.5.
